case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. KIMMARY LOEUM HART

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $46.05) SERVED NOV-19-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HART, KIMMARY LOEUM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CCSF, REPRESETNED BY JOANN ADAMS, SR. COLLECTIOS OFFICER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KIMMARY LOEUM HART IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVIEWD AND RETURNED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TREASURER OF TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HART, KIMMARY LOEUM $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.05 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,046.05 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TREASURER OF TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HART, KIMMARY LOEUM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
